_doc: Noise-reduction filter config for the events pipeline stage. Loaded by domains/events/noise_filter.load_default_config(). Override per-run via StageContext.params.

materiality._doc: Per-category deal_value / market_cap thresholds. The lowest 'medium' threshold below acts as the gate; events with material_pct < medium are dropped. material_pct=null (unknown deal value or market cap) is allowed through (neutral).

time_decay._doc: Hard lookback cutoff. Categories in extended_categories use the longer window because M&A / litigation / SAST processes drag on.

per_symbol_dedup._doc: Suppress an enriched signal when the same (symbol, top_category) already produced a delivered publish within the last N days.

corroboration._doc: If the same event appears at NSE and BSE within this window, mark corroborated=true on the kept events. Drives Phase 6 publish routing (corroborated => higher routing tier).
